violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Seal bare-wood surfaces on counter near convection ovens.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Newly installed double convection oven not located under hood system. Residential stove/oven not located under hood.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Broken PVC pipe drain line near convection ovens needs repair. Hand sink drain line leaking onto floor. Needs repair.
Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed utility faucet as required.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have a build up of debris & moisture around areas of plumbing near convection ovens and need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor in kitchen area has peeling laminate.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Seal bare-wood surfaces in kitchen area.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Residential stove/oven and commercial convection oven not located under hood.
Backflow prevention. — --Backflow prevention device has not been installed or maintained on faucet as required. Utility hose in kitchen not fitted with back-flow prevention.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Hand towel dispenser at hand sink empty.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Areas of floors and ceiling need repair in kitchen area.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Back door not fitted with self closing mechanism.
